brainstorming.reason: Generate candidate angles before narrowing to an answer or opinion.
brainstorming.when: Use before convergence when the option space is still too narrow or underspecified.

good-thinking.reason: Audit reasoning quality before presenting a high-confidence answer.
good-thinking.when: Use when confidence is important but evidence, assumptions, or tradeoffs need another pass.

grill-me.reason: Stress-test a plan, design, or opinion before finalizing it.
grill-me.when: Use when the user asks to challenge the conclusion or when the stakes justify adversarial review.
